name: AVImark Veterinary Software API
what_it_does: AVImark Veterinary Practice Management Software REST API for small animal, mixed practice, and equine veterinary clinics. Enables AI agents to manage patient (animal) medical records and appointment scheduling for veterinary workflow automation, handle veterinary billing and insurance claim management for practice revenue management, access prescription management and medication dispensing for veterinary pharmacy workflow, retrieve treatment history and clinical notes for veterinary clinical decision support, manage vaccine and wellness protocol tracking for preventive care compliance, handle client communication and reminder management for patient engagement, access inventory and drug management for veterinary practice supply control, retrieve laboratory integration for diagnostic result workflow, manage multi-species patient record management for mixed practice operations, and integrate AVImark with Covetrus pharmacy, imaging, and laboratory platforms.
use_cases: Scheduling veterinary appointments from practice management agents
Processing veterinary billing from revenue cycle agents
Managing medication dispensing from pharmacy workflow agents
Tracking wellness protocols from preventive care agents
not_for: Large specialty hospital systems requiring complex PIMS
Practices using IDEXX Cornerstone or ezyVet exclusively
Non-veterinary healthcare without animal patient context
best_when: A small to mid-size veterinary practice using AVImark (Covetrus) wants AI agents to automate appointment management, billing, medication dispensing, and wellness protocol tracking.
avoid_when: DEA CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE COMPLIANCE: AVImark manages veterinary drug dispensing — automated Schedule II-V controlled drug records must comply with DEA regulations; automated dispensing without valid prescription or VCPR creates DEA risk. VCPR requirement — automated prescription refills require valid Veterinary-Client-Patient Relationship; automated refills without recent veterinarian-patient examination violates state veterinary practice acts. Covetrus ownership — Covetrus (formerly McKesson Animal Health merged with Henry Schein Animal Health) acquired AVImark; verify current API status and integration stability under Covetrus ownership.

auth.notes: AVImark uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON for integrations. Limited public developer documentation. AVImark is owned by Covetrus (Portland, ME). Covetrus (formerly CD&R PE, taken private 2023). AVImark founded 1985. 14,000+ veterinary practices. Strong in small animal and mixed practice market. Competes with IDEXX Cornerstone and ezyVet for veterinary practice management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual per-workstation subscription
pricing.notes: Portland, ME (Covetrus). Founded 1985. CD&R PE-backed (private 2023). 14,000+ vet practices. Small animal and mixed practice PIMS. Competes with Cornerstone for veterinary management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per partner integration

known_agent_gotchas: DEA CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE: Automated veterinary drug dispensing for Schedule II-V medications must maintain accurate DEA perpetual inventory; automated dispensing errors create DEA audit risk and potential veterinary license consequences

VCPR dispensing requirement — automated prescription refills without valid VCPR violate state veterinary practice acts; VCPR validity (typically 1 year) must be verified before automated prescription processing
On-premises architecture — AVImark is primarily on-premises software; cloud API integration requires network path to practice server; hardware reliability and network availability affect API uptime
No webhooks — appointment, billing, and prescription events require polling; no native event push for AVImark workflow events

Covetrus integration dependency — AVImark deep integration with Covetrus pharmacy and supply products; third-party pharmacy and supply integration may have limited API coverage compared to native Covetrus integration
Legacy data model — AVImark is a 1985-era system with legacy data model; some data structures and field names reflect historical design choices that require careful mapping
agent_readiness.security_notes: Veterinary practice management. SOC2. API key auth. US. Veterinary patient and drug data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Veterinary PIMS. SOC2. API key. US. Veterinary patient and controlled substance data.
